insights.title: 23-Year Growth: From 326K to 6.5M Reports
insights.statement: The Consumer Sentinel Network has recorded a 20x increase in annual reports since 2001. Growth accelerated sharply in 2020 (+48% YoY) and has remained elevated — 2024 posted the highest total ever at 6.47M.

insights.title: 'Other' Reports Are the Fastest-Growing Type
insights.statement: 'Other' reports (non-fraud, non-identity-theft) grew from 14% of total in 2001 to 42.5% in 2024, surpassing fraud as the largest report category by type. This reflects expanding Sentinel scope and new complaint types.

insights.title: Fraud Growth Is Consolidating Into Fewer Categories
insights.statement: While overall reports grew 21.7% from 2022–2024, a single category (Credit Bureaus) accounted for more than half of the absolute increase. The top 3 fastest-growing categories together drove the majority of new volume.
insights.metric: 762K new Credit Bureau reports (52% of growth)

insights.title: Identity Theft Peaked in 2021 and Is Stabilizing
insights.statement: Identity theft reports hit 1.43M in 2021, fell to 1.04M in 2023, and rebounded slightly to 1.14M in 2024. Its share of total reports has declined from 23.4% (2021) to 17.5% (2024) as other categories grow faster.
